div.p: Architecture for overflow and underflow detection via guard values. sizeof = N bytes

g.text: | Corruption Vector | Sentinel Affected | Detection Latency | Mechanism |
| **Buffer Overflow** | Back Canary | Late (at `free`) | Tail Guard Mismatch |
| **Buffer Underflow** | Front Canary | Late (at `free`) | Head Guard Mismatch |

text.tspan: | Corruption Vector | Sentinel Affected | Detection Latency | Mechanism |
| **Buffer Overflow** | Back Canary | Late (at `free`) | Tail Guard Mismatch |
| **Buffer Underflow** | Front Canary | Late (at `free`) | Head Guard Mismatch |

g.text: * @brief Translates user pointer to allocation start.

text.tspan: * @brief Translates user pointer to allocation start.

g.title: Offset: 0x08 | Size: N-16 bytes | Type: raw_data
Offset: N-8 | Size: 8 bytes | Type: uint64_t

g.text: Note: App receives pointer to user_data segment only.

g.title: Offset: 0x08 | Size: N-16 bytes | Type: raw_data
Offset: N-8 | Size: 8 bytes | Type: uint64_t
